cve_samples.description: Buffer overflow in C++ string handling function
cve_samples.affected_code: void processString(char* input) { char buffer[256]; strcpy(buffer, input); }
cve_samples.patch: void processString(const std::string& input) { std::string buffer = input; }

cve_samples.description: Use-after-free vulnerability in C++ object lifecycle
cve_samples.affected_code: MyClass* obj = new MyClass(); delete obj; obj->method();
int index = size * sizeof(int); int* arr = new int[index];
cve_samples.patch: size_t index = static_cast<size_t>(size) * sizeof(int); if (index > MAX_SAFE_SIZE) throw std::overflow_error("Index too large"); int* arr = new int[index];
